data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of having different daily and weekly rates. However, the evidence does not explicitly confirm the implementation of this requirement. While the linked use case mentions a weekly rate being 20% off, there is no concrete evidence showing how these rates are applied or enforced in the booking process, indicating a gap in coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the enforcement of different daily vs weekly rates.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
